corrections.location: line 5, first word after verse 5 marker

corrections.note: Comma present after ἀναπαύσει in the print.
Acute, not circumflex, in the printed text.
Transcript has a different word; printed text reads καὶ ἀποθαυμῶν εἰς οὐδένα φόβον.
Separator is a vertical bar, not a parenthesis.

corrections.correct: + επαγωγαι λεμος (λιμα. BaA) και συντριμμα και μαστιγες Bab mg sup

notes: Left-margin numbers 3–15 and parenthetical (5), (7) are present as line indicators in the transcript; they are not treated as errors here because the source transcription format may intentionally preserve them. Apparatus otherwise matches page layout and sigla closely.
